prompt: The controller of the Red Wing Corporation is in the process of preparing the company’s 2027 financial statements, and is trying to determine the correct balance of cash and cash equivalents to be reported as a current asset in the balance sheet. The following items are being considered:
requirements: Determine the correct balance of cash and cash equivalents to be reported in the current asset section of the 2027 balance sheet.
For each of the items not included in your answer to requirement 1, select the correct classification of the item.
title: Exercise 7-1 (Algo) Cash and cash equivalents; restricted cash; financial statement effects [LO7-2]
